institution.name: South Dakota School of Mines and Technology

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at South Dakota School of Mines and Technology fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at South Dakota School of Mines and Technology are 47% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($72.3k vs $49.3k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at South Dakota School of Mines and Technology rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (70.4% → 84.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at South Dakota School of Mines and Technology fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.1k → $10.5k).
